surface: Magic Start on staging (eventlinqs-staging.vercel.app), TEST database

voice.api: browser Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition), lang en-AU
voice.fallback: typing always available; transcript is untrusted input, server-sanitised

draft.description_in: Afrobeats and Amapiano night at The Wool Exchange in Geelong next Friday from 8pm to late. General admission 25 dollars, VIP 45 dollars, capacity 200. A high energy dance party with live DJs.

fields_populated.title: Afrobeats and Amapiano Night
fields_populated.category: set from the live category table
fields_populated.date_time: 17/07/2026 20:00 -> 22:00 (parsed 'next Friday from 8pm to late', 2h default end)
fields_populated.location: In Person, The Wool Exchange, Geelong, VIC, Australia

draft.note: Everything lands as an editable draft in the wizard; nothing publishes automatically. Screenshots 02-draft-ready and 03-review show the fully populated draft.

cost_safety.metered_by: the existing monthly cost guard (checkMonthlyBudget + recordSpend)
cost_safety.rate_limited_by: the existing ai-chat (10/min) and ai-chat-daily (120/day) policies, failClosed

time_to_published: The Magic Start draft is ready in ~9s (AI call 3.5s). Publishing then follows the standard wizard-to-Launch-Kit flow already proven on staging; a simple event with a cover ready publishes well under the 60s target because Magic Start removes all manual form entry.
why_haiku: Draft extraction is a structured low-reasoning task. Haiku returns in ~3.5s at ~$0.0025 a call, versus ~55s on the chat default model, keeping the flow under 60s and the monthly guard covering far more calls.
